title: erysimum grandiflorum
intro: Erysimum grandiflorum, also known as the "Tree Poppy" or "Tall Wallflower", is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erysimum grandiflorum include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, with some herbal preparations also involving the use of the plant's roots and leaves.
